data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of service add-ons, specifically deep conditioning, as part of the service offerings. However, the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of this specific add-on. The linked use case mentions 'service add-ons (deep conditioning)' as a need, but there is no supporting evidence to demonstrate that this requirement is met, indicating a clear gap.
gaps: No evidence of the existence or functionality of the service add-on (deep conditioning).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for service add-ons
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the service add-on 'deep conditioning' is available and correctly configured.
